full_text:
Ying Qu (Xiulian) 應璩 (休璉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ying Qu (應璩), styledXiulian (休璉), was born in Runan. Satirical poet whose work was popular for some time, didn’t reach the heights he hoped. Ying Qu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Ying Qu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
